method: Abstractive Text Summarisation using T5 Transformer Architecture
Text to Text Transfer Transformer (T5) approach
Transfer Learning based model for abstractive text summarization
datasets: Dataset contains Authorname, Headlines, Url of Article, Short text, Complete Article
News stories scraped from Hindu, Indian Times, and Guardian
limitations: Producing exact and meaningful summaries of big texts is a time-consuming endeavor
Machines face challenges in text summarization due to a deficiency of human knowledge, leading to varying results
Identifying informative segments and generating concise text is a main challenge in summarization
Determining the quality of a summary is challenging as there is no 'ideal' summary
Human summaries only meet up to 60% of the time when measuring sentence content overlap in news articles
Reformulating extracted and fused content into text with new phrases during the generation phase is difficult
